zh-HK: EDM 設定 modal 完善：狀態保存、mode 切換、真實 HTML preview 與 package / bundle 顯示更一致
Dim Sum Paper 支援多頁產品，超過 36 個 item 會分頁並顯示 Page X / Y，不再限制只輸出一頁
下載 PNG 修正：Dim Sum Paper 多頁會逐頁下載 page_01 / page_02；移除 invalid table/div wrapper 令 page 1 不再空白
Dim Sum Paper 輸出改為 HTML-safe text escape，避免產品描述中的特殊字元令 DOM parser 走位
產品群組預覽改善：讀取 product CSV descriptionEng / descriptionChi mapping，支援中英顏色縮寫與 tape 尺寸 / 碼數 variant 自動群組
Cut Off Segmentation 修正：N0-N6 新客以首次落單月份優先判斷，當月 / 近 6 個月 NB 不再被 Cut Off A+ / A1-A6 邏輯覆蓋
Segmentation filter UI 更新 Cut Off 說明，標示 A+ 只代表非 N0-N6 新客且基準月或之後仍有訂單
MTD 當前狀態新增 KPI Cut Off Day，可用最新資料日、昨日、今日快速查詢，active KPI month 不再限制當月
查詢過往月份時，MTD Sales / Actual Margin % 改用 Sales History / merged history，不再只認 MTD Daily upload
Full Month Target 跟 KPI cut off month，同步讀寫該月份 Monthly Target row
新增 Q1-Q4 季度分析，按 1-3、4-6、7-9、10-12 月份加總季度 target、actual、remaining 與 required margin
Monthly Target Table YA 只作 Target 留空 fallback；已填 Target Sales / Target Margin 不會被 YA 覆蓋，並保留 0 值
Monthly Target Table 新增 Export / Import JSON backup，匯入後即時刷新 Full Month / Full Year Target 及 MTD 分析
Monthly Target modal 改為 header/footer 固定、中間表格 scroll，修正 Export / Import / Done footer 被裁切
年度 YTD 含 MTD Daily：過往月份 Invoiced Sales + 當月 MTD Daily，避免 invoice 重疊雙計，Full Year 卡片同年度分析同步
年度 Margin 追返：Sales 達標但 margin 落後時顯示尚欠 Cash Margin、追返組合（$ × %）、每月均值同剩餘月份計劃提示
年度 / NB 追返 UI 精簡：合併重複警告段落，改為數字卡片 + 一行提示
MTD 版面：Daily Target 計算 同 yyyy-mm 同期實際數據 搬至 MTD 當前狀態欄
Monthly Target Table 新增 YA Sales / YA Margin % 欄，自動從上年同月 Invoiced Sales 填充，可手改
Target Sales 留空時暫用 YA Sales 匯總 Year Target；Target Margin 留空且用 YA Sales 時同步用 YA Margin；Summary 顯示 YA 頂替 N 個月
NB Margin 追返計算：margin 未達標時成對顯示增量 sales + margin %（報價 margin / 剩餘 Sales Target / Target+1%）；MTD modal NB / Exclusion 區塊編號改為 4 / 5
MTD Margin 分析重整：Target 設定合併 Full Month / Full Year，Monthly Target Table 改為彈窗編輯，12 個月 Working Days 會按月曆及 window.hkHolidays / hk-holidays JSON 香港公眾假期自動計算
New Business (NB) 分析改用 Sold-to M0 / M1-M5 Sales Data 自動填充，並加入 account adjustment table 支援 Fully Transferred Out 及 NB Only Exclude
Exclusion / Inclusion Margin Calculator 支援 Include / Exclude、EB/NB role、Sales Amount、Margin % 與 Cash Margin 自動計算，已落單或 back order 可從 MTD / NB 分析扣除
Customer Report CSV 補回 Sales Area 並加入 Handle By，欄位固定輸出於 Account No 前；Sales Buddy mapping 支援 comma、tab 或空格貼入並存入 IndexedDB / localStorage fallback
Customer Report 匯出效能優化：Sales Area / Handle By 改用一次性 lookup cache，Sold-to mapping 可配對 Ship-to report row，並減少逐行掃 sales history 導致的 UI 堵塞
Seg (標準) 新客修正：首次下單月份優先判斷，當月全新客為 N0、上月全新客為 N1，不再因多張 invoice 被歸入 A+
Sales History / Summary Recap UI refresh：加入 Table/KPI view toggle、Trend evo% 合併卡、年度 KPI 月度展開與 matrix tables
Customer Report / EDM 帳號層級修正：以 Ship-to 為銷售基礎，Sold-to / National Leader 正確 roll-up，並避免同號帳號雙計
Solution Preview / Solution Mix MTD 修正：本月 MTD Daily 作 source of truth，支援多個 Item Code 欄名，零金額命中仍會顯示客戶與 Solution row
en: Improved EDM config modal persistence, mode switching, real HTML preview, and package / bundle rendering consistency
Dim Sum Paper now supports multiple pages: more than 36 items are split into Page X / Y instead of being capped to one page
Fixed PNG download for multi-page Dim Sum Paper: pages export as page_01 / page_02, and page 1 no longer renders blank
Dim Sum Paper output now escapes product text safely to prevent special characters from breaking the preview DOM
Improved product group preview by loading product CSV descriptionEng / descriptionChi mapping, color abbreviations, and tape size / yard variants
Fixed Cut Off Segmentation: N0-N6 new customers now take priority by first-order month, so current / recent NB accounts are no longer overridden by Cut Off A+ / A1-A6 logic
Updated Segmentation filter UI copy for Cut Off mode to clarify that A+ only covers non-N0-N6 customers with orders on or after the cut-off base month
MTD Current Status adds KPI Cut Off Day with latest-data, yesterday, and today shortcuts; active KPI month is no longer limited to the current month
Historical-month MTD Sales / Actual Margin % now use Sales History / merged history instead of only MTD Daily upload data
Full Month Target now follows the KPI cut-off month and reads/writes that month in the Monthly Target Table
Added Q1-Q4 quarter analysis using 1-3, 4-6, 7-9, and 10-12 target, actual, remaining, and required-margin rollups
Monthly Target YA values are fallback only when Target is empty; filled Target Sales / Target Margin are not overwritten, including explicit zero values
Monthly Target Table now supports Export / Import JSON backup, refreshing Full Month / Full Year Target and MTD analysis after import
Monthly Target modal now keeps header/footer fixed and scrolls the table body, fixing clipped Export / Import / Done footer buttons
Year YTD now includes MTD Daily: prior months from Invoiced Sales plus current month from MTD Daily, avoiding duplicate invoice overlap in Full Year cards and year analysis
Year margin catch-up when sales target is met but margin lags: shows cash margin gap, catch-up pair ($ × %), monthly average, and remaining-month plan hints
Simplified year and NB catch-up UI: merged duplicate warnings into compact metric cards plus one-line alerts
MTD layout: Daily Target calculation and same-period-last-year actuals moved to the MTD Current Status column
Monthly Target Table adds YA Sales and YA Margin % columns auto-filled from last-year same-month Invoiced Sales, editable and persisted
Empty Target Sales falls back to YA Sales for Year Target rollup; empty Target Margin uses YA Margin when YA Sales applies; summary shows YA fallback month count
NB margin catch-up: paired incremental sales + margin % when below target (quote margin / remaining sales target / target+1% fallback); MTD modal NB / Exclusion section badges renumbered to 4 / 5

Refreshed MTD Margin analysis: Target Settings now combines Full Month and Full Year targets, Monthly Target Table opens in a popup, and 12-month working days are auto-calculated from the calendar and window.hkHolidays / hk-holidays JSON public holidays
New Business (NB) analysis now auto-fills Sold-to M0 / M1-M5 from Sales Data and adds an account adjustment table for Fully Transferred Out and NB Only Exclude cases

Exclusion / Inclusion Margin Calculator now supports Include / Exclude, EB/NB role, Sales Amount, Margin %, and calculated Cash Margin so ordered or back-order values can be excluded from MTD / NB analysis
Customer Report CSV now adds Sales Area and Handle By before Account No; Sales Buddy mappings support comma, tab, or space-separated paste and are stored in IndexedDB with a localStorage fallback
Optimized Customer Report export: Sales Area / Handle By enrichment now uses a one-pass lookup cache, Sold-to mappings can resolve Ship-to report rows, and repeated sales-history scans are avoided
Fixed standard Segmentation for new customers: first-order month now takes priority, current-month new customers are N0 and last-month new customers are N1 instead of being promoted to A+
Refreshed Sales History / Summary Recap UI with Table/KPI view toggle, combined Trend evo% card, expandable yearly KPI months, and matrix tables
Fixed Customer Report / EDM account hierarchy: Ship-to is now the sales base, Sold-to / National Leader roll up correctly, and duplicate same-account rows are avoided
Fixed Solution Preview / Solution Mix MTD handling: current-month MTD Daily is the source of truth, Item Code aliases are supported, and zero-amount hits still show customers and Solution rows
